article_items.title: Build an enterprise observability solution for Amazon Quick | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: When hundreds to thousands of users are onboarded to an enterprise AI platform, business leaders and platform owners need visibility into who is using the platform, whether users are satisfied with the answers they receive, and which capabilities are driving the most engagement. Without a centralized observability solution, this data is scattered across multiple AWS

article_items.title: Diverse reasoning traces teach LLMs to make better decisions
article_items.description: How to train language models to generate diverse, accurate reasoning paths using tokens that control distinct reasoning strategies.
article_items.excerpt: How to train language models to generate diverse, accurate reasoning paths using tokens that control distinct reasoning strategies.
article_items.summary: Related publications Training large language models to reason in parallel with global forking tokens Customized Amazon Nova models improve molecular-property prediction in drug discovery Krishnateja Killamsetty , Andy Lapastora , Karthick Prasad Gunasekaran April 15, 2026 A single, optimized LLM unifies what previously required multiple models and can serve as a reasoning partner for medical chemists. Global forking tokens are used to elicit distinct reasoning modes, enabling the model to produce diverse... The practical impact: Together, SSFT and GFPO enable models to both learn diverse reasoning strategies and select the right one at inference time. These tokens enable the model to generate diverse, high-quality reasoning paths for the same problem. Watch next: To prompt a single LLM to adopt different reasoning strategies, we introduce a set of global forking tokens (such as <think1> through <think6> in the figure below) in the post-training phase, each intended to elicit a distinct reasoning mode. Related publications Training large language models to reason...
article_items.what_happened: Related publications Training large language models to reason in parallel with global forking tokens Customized Amazon Nova models improve molecular-property prediction in drug discovery Krishnateja Killamsetty , Andy Lapastora , Karthick Prasad Gunasekaran April 15, 2026 A single, optimized LLM unifies what previously required multiple models and can serve as a reasoning partner for medical chemists. Global forking tokens are used to elicit distinct reasoning modes, enabling the model to produce diverse...
article_items.why_matters: The practical impact: Together, SSFT and GFPO enable models to both learn diverse reasoning strategies and select the right one at inference time. These tokens enable the model to generate diverse, high-quality reasoning paths for the same problem.
article_items.what_to_watch: Watch next: To prompt a single LLM to adopt different reasoning strategies, we introduce a set of global forking tokens (such as <think1> through <think6> in the figure below) in the post-training phase, each intended to elicit a distinct reasoning mode. Related publications Training large language models to reason...
key_points: Related publications Training large language models to reason in parallel with global forking tokens Customized Amazon Nova models improve molecular-property prediction in drug discovery Krishnateja Killamsetty ...
Global forking tokens are used to elicit distinct reasoning modes, enabling the model to produce diverse, high-quality reasoning paths.
Diverse reasoning traces teach LLMs to make better decisions How to train language models to generate diverse, accurate reasoning paths using tokens that control distinct reasoning strategies.

Given the usefulness of parallel reasoning for evaluation, the question naturally arises, Can we expand the limits of LLMs’ reasoning capacities by training them on diverse reasoning traces for each question?

Machine learning Customizing multiturn AI agents with reinforcement learning Shreyas Subramanian , Panpan Xu , Yawei Wang January 13, 2026 Leveraging existing environment simulators and reward functions based on...
How to train language models to generate diverse, accurate reasoning paths using tokens that control distinct reasoning strategies.
To address this, we propose set-supervised fine tuning (SSFT) - a simple and principled training approach that enables models to learn multiple distinct reasoning strategies from diverse supervision.
While supervised training encourages the model to learn diverse reasoning strategies, it does not explicitly teach the model which strategy to use for a given question.
Parallel reasoning - in which multiple, diverse reasoning paths are generated and compared for the same problem - is emerging as a key tool for understanding the limits of LLMs’ reasoning capability.
SSFT models reasoning as a set of complete solution paths, while GFPO selects the most effective reasoning mode for each input.

In practice, multiple reasoning traces for the same question can be obtained by prompting multiple teacher models, sampling alternative reasoning paths from a single model, or aggregating solutions from heterogeneous...
We evaluate SSFT+GFPO on both reasoning and coding benchmarks along two axes: (i) accuracy and (ii) diversity of reasoning.
